# Trimble B2W

This Project Setup module can be used to link a
 non-Spectrum estimating program to your Spectrum application.
The Project Setup Installation screen is provided in two parts.

- First specify the software you will use for estimating

- Based on your choice, the
 system completes the remainder of the installation screen and allows further entry.

Select Project
 Setup  from the Installation list. The Project Setup Installation screen displays.
For more information, see the [B2W
 Export Steps](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/2463d2d0-9b55-11ec-840b-42010a800002?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..gM6dt5Q11RYmiEyHNt0rZk-E_1kuA3R1tWdqqcP0Cxk&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22BID2WIN_Standard_Export.pdf%22).
